    • extractProblemTerm

      public Term extractProblemTerm(Proof p)

    • isOneStepSimplificationEnabled

      public static boolean isOneStepSimplificationEnabled(Proof proof)
      Checks if one step simplification is enabled in the given Proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to read from or null to return the general settings value.
      Returns:
      true one step simplification is enabled, false if disabled.

    • setOneStepSimplificationEnabled

      public static void setOneStepSimplificationEnabled(Proof proof, boolean enabled)
      Defines if one step simplification is enabled in general and within the Proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - The optional Proof.
      enabled - true use one step simplification, false do not use one step simplification.

    • setDefaultTacletOptions

      public static Map<String,String> setDefaultTacletOptions(File baseDir, String javaPathInBaseDir) throws ProblemLoaderException, ProofInputException
      Ensures that the default taclet options are defined.
      Parameters:
      baseDir - The base directory which contains the java file.
      javaPathInBaseDir - The path in the base directory to the java file.
      Returns:
      The original settings which are overwritten.
      Throws:
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • setDefaultTacletOptionsForTarget

      public static Map<String,String> setDefaultTacletOptionsForTarget(File javaFile, String containerTypeName, String targetName) throws ProblemLoaderException, ProofInputException
      Ensures that the default taclet options are defined.
      Parameters:
      javaFile - The java file to load.
      containerTypeName - The type name which provides the target.
      targetName - The target to proof.
      Returns:
      The original settings which are overwritten.
      Throws:
      ProblemLoaderException - Occurred Exception.
      ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

    • setDefaultTacletOptions

      public static Map<String,String> setDefaultTacletOptions()
      Ensures that the default taclet options are defined.
      Returns:
      The original settings which are overwritten.

    • restoreTacletOptions

      public static void restoreTacletOptions(Map<String,String> options)
      Restores the given taclet options.
      Parameters:
      options - The taclet options to restore.

    • searchProgramMethod

      public static IProgramMethod searchProgramMethod(Services services, String containerTypeName, String methodFullName)
      Searches a IProgramMethod in the given Services.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to search in.
      containerTypeName - The name of the type which contains the method.
      methodFullName - The method name to search.
      Returns:
      The first found IProgramMethod in the type.

      public static Services createServices(File keyFile)
